---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**What problem are you trying to solve?**
A description of the problem or limitation, *not just the desired solution*.
"I'm always frustrated when…" / "It would help our team if…"

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to happen, in concrete terms. Sketch the UX or API if useful.

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches you've thought about and why this one wins.

**Prior art**
Links to other projects that handle this well, screenshots, RFCs, etc.

**Additional context**
Mockups, scope hints (small / medium / large), willingness to contribute a PR, etc.
